_publications._publicationTitle: Epigenetic reprogramming shapes the cellular landscape of schwannoma.

_contextSnippet: Integration of 10,628 single-nuclei or single-cell transcriptomes using Harmony revealed 13 cell clusters in uniform manifold approximation and projection (UMAP) space
